name: Bedrock Modern
author: your@email.com
description: Minecraft Bedrock Dedicated Server with Playit.gg tunneling, RCON console bridge, and Git config sync.

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash

apt update && apt install -y unzip curl jq
mkdir -p /home/container
cd /home/container

BEDROCK_URL="https://www.minecraft.net/bedrockdedicatedserver/bin-linux-preview/bedrock-server-1.26.20.28.zip"
if [ ! -f "bedrock_server" ]; then
  curl -sSL -o bedrock.zip "$BEDROCK_URL"
  unzip -qo bedrock.zip
  rm bedrock.zip
  chmod +x bedrock_server
fi

# mcrcon for console bridge
curl -sSL https://github.com/Tiiffi/mcrcon/releases/download/v0.7.2/mcrcon-0.7.2-linux-x86-64.tar.gz | tar xz
mv mcrcon-0.7.2-linux-x86-64/mcrcon ./
chmod +x mcrcon
rm -rf mcrcon-*

# Playit agent (optional, runs inside container)
curl -sSL -o playit-agent "https://github.com/playit-cloud/playit-agent/releases/latest/download/playit-linux-amd64"
chmod +x playit-agent

# Create bds-control wrapper
cat > bds-control <<'WRAPPER'
#!/bin/bash
set -m

# Generate server.properties from variables
cat > server.properties <<EOF
server-name=${SERVER_NAME}
gamemode=${GAMEMODE}
difficulty=${DIFFICULTY}
max-players=${MAX_PLAYERS}
online-mode=${ONLINE_MODE}
server-port=${SERVER_PORT}
level-name=${LEVEL_NAME}
level-seed=${LEVEL_SEED}
EOF

# If PLAYIT enabled, start playit agent in background
if [[ "${PLAYIT_ENABLED}" == "true" ]]; then
  echo "Creating playit tunnel..."
  cat > playit.toml <<TOML
secret = "${PLAYIT_SECRET}"

[tunnels.udp-19132]
type = "udp"
local_address = "127.0.0.1:${SERVER_PORT}"
remote_port = 0
TOML
  ./playit-agent --config playit.toml > playit.log 2>&1 &
  PLAYIT_PID=$!
  sleep 5
  # Grab public address
  TUNNEL_LINE=$(grep -m1 'assigned address' playit.log || echo "Tunnel active but address not yet shown")
  echo "Join Address: $TUNNEL_LINE"
fi

# Start Bedrock server in background, pipe stdout/stderr to container
./bedrock_server 2>&1 &
SERVER_PID=$!

# Console bridge: read stdin and send via mcrcon
sleep 5
while IFS= read -r cmd; do
  if [ -n "$cmd" ]; then
    echo "$cmd" | ./mcrcon -H 127.0.0.1 -P 25575 -p "${RCON_PASSWORD:-minecraft}" || true
  fi
done < /dev/stdin &
BRIDGE_PID=$!

# Wait for server to exit, then clean up
wait $SERVER_PID
kill $PLAYIT_PID 2>/dev/null || true
kill $BRIDGE_PID 2>/dev/null || true
WRAPPER
chmod +x bds-control

# Git config sync
if [ ! -z "${GIT_REPO}" ]; then
  git clone ${GIT_REPO} /tmp/git-config
  cp -r /tmp/git-config/bds-config/* /home/container/
  rm -rf /tmp/git-config
fi

echo "Installation complete"
